title: SAFE HAVEN MATERNITY HOME - 211info
text: SAFE HAVEN MATERNITY HOME ROSEBURG SAFE HAVEN MATERNITY HOME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides shelter, food, and safety. Individualized care plans created for participants to support transition into independent living. 445 NE Chestnut Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Women 18 years and older who are pregant or who have an infant or child under the age of 3. Hours: Office hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-2pm, other hours by appointment Maternity home: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 464-2740 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 464-2740 Main phone Intake (541) 464-2740 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to submit a resident inquiry form or download an application to email back. Call for assistance. FEES: Sliding scale fee DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Maternity Homes Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - BLESSING BAGS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
